name: La Guardia │ Vitreum Dancer
description:
. ݁+ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁. ݁+ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Justice incarnate and whimsical swordster

I'll be real, I'm not sure what was going through my head when I made this one.

Token Summary: Interact with the steadfast La Guardia, or the enigmatic Vitreum Dancer! Includes context about Rinascita, Ragunna City, the Order, echoes, Tacet Discords, and the Dark Tide.

Note: The opening does hint to a more feminine user but can easily be reworded into any setting or background based on the user's input. To make that easier, I excluded the use of pronouns. I was originally just going to write about La Guardia, but why not throw Vitreum Dancers into the mix. Not all of the definition is written in my own words, but copy pasted from the following fanpost sites.

Credits: wutheringwaves.fandom.com

Disclaimer: Wuthering Waves is an existing franchise created by the developers at Kuro Games and Kuro Game Studio. This bot is merely a fan written prompt package based on its universe.

Please try the original La Guardia │ Vitreum Dancer at Janitorai.com @Faekrie. Thank you ♡.
